product_name: Okami: Shiranui PVC (Normal Pose) - Standard Edition

bullets: Officially licensed Okami collectible statue — Shiranui, Normal Pose
Depicts Shiranui, the hero who saved Kamiki Village from the evil Orochi
Features the Solar Flare Divine Instrument used to fend off evil in Nippon
Available in 2 different poses: Normal Pose and Celestial Howl
content.description:
Shiranui is the hero of Kamiki Village during the events in Nippon one hundred years
prior, saving its people from the evil Orochi. He reincarnated into Amaterasu years later after rumors of Orichi's return spread across the land. Shiranui is a silent protagonist, able to communicate through his Celestial Envoy Ishaku. Apart from the 13 Celestial Brush techniques, Shiranui also uses his Divine Instrument, the Solar Flare, to fend off the evil the remains in Nippon.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• Okami – Shiranui PVC painted statue (Standard or Celestial Howl pose)
• Highly detailed base inspired by the Okami art style
• Ishaku's head rotatable
• Glow-in-the-dark tendrils
• Collector’s Box & F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
